folio.label: 102r
folio.l: I cam , and naked mot I turne a geyn
Al ©oure plesaunce , wold I folwe feyn
But ©et I hope , it be nat ©oure entent
That I smokles , out of ©oure paleys went

note.notetxt: 875 f102r ink change: from light brown to brown.ODR

folio.l: ¢ ñe coude nat do , so dishonest a thyngö
That thilke wombe , in whicú ©oure children ley
Shulde byfornö the peeple , in my walkyngö
Be seyn al bare , wherfore I ©ow prey
Late me nat lyke a worme , go by the wey
Remembre ©ow , myn owen lord so dere
I was ©oure wyf , thougú I vnworthy were
¢ Wherfore in guerdone , of my maydenhede
Whicú that I brougút , and nougút a geyn I bere
As vouchesaf , to ©eue me to my mede
But swicú a smok , as I was wont to were
That I there witú may wrye , the wombe of heerehireheeire
That was ©oure wyf , and here I take my leue
Of ©ow myn owen lord , leste I ©ow greue
¢ The smok q¶ he , that æè hast on thy bak
Lat it be stille , and bere it fortú witú the
But wel vnethes , thilke word he spak
But went his wey , for reuthe and for pite
Biforn~ the folk , hire seluen stripetú she
And in hire smok , witú foot and hede al bare
Toward hire fadres hous , fortúfortú is she fare
¢ The folk hire folwen , wepyngö in here wey

note.notetxt: double check the last two letters in folk/ODR/

folio.l: And fortune ay , they cursen , as they gon
But she fro wepyngö , kepetú hire eyen drey
Ne in this tyme , word ne spak she noon
Hire fader , that this tidyngö , herd a noon
Cursed the day , and tyme , that nature
Shop~ hi~ to ben , a lyues creature
¢ For out of doute , this olde poore man
Was euäe in suspect , of hire mariage
For euäe he demed , sithe that it bygan
That whan the lord , fulfilled had his corage
Hym wolde thynke , it were a disperage
To his estate , so lowe for to ligút
And voyden hire , as sone as euäe he mygút
¢ A geyns his dougúter , hastily gotú he
For he by noyse of folk , knew hire comyngö
And witú hire olde cote , as it mygút be
He couered hire , ful sorwefully wepyngö
But oon hire body , mygút he it nat bryngö
For rude was the clotú , and she more of age

note.notetxt: 914The last three lines are crammed. also double check signature.ODR
